subject: Re: Vacation Requests
body:
no need for me


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, February 4, 2008 12:02:48 PM
Subject: Vacation Requests


Do you need or want to be informed of LSJ Staff Vacation Requests?  Or should I deal with Lance and Maren about vacations without you.  FYI, generally, as long as Lance and Maren can confirm that there is coverage for your needs and the request is not in excess of vacation benefits granted, I would not object to any vacation requests that they submit to me on behalf of LSJ.  If Lance and Maren themselves ask for time off, I would discuss that with you since it would most directly impact you.  Of course, I would ask Lance and Maren to make sure that Brice and/or Karen would be available to fill in for them.
 
Sincerely,

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
Fourth Floor
New York, New York 10022
Telephone: 212-750-1176
Telecopier: 212-750-0381
Mobile: 862-485-6315
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com

 
------------------------------

Each taxpayer should seek advice based on the taxpayer's particular circumstances from an independent tax advisor.
